input.background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.
input.question: The closer 7 is to 1, the stronger the linear relation between X and Y.

X.description: One of the variables in the linear relationship being assessed.

Y.description: The other variable in the linear relationship being assessed.

CorrelationCoefficient.description: A measure of the strength and direction of the linear relationship between X and Y.
